register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details to get started

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email, you will receive a reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.invalidMessage: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.gettingStartedDescription: This is a placeholder dashboard. Connect your data and customize it.
dashboard.accountStatus: Your role is <role>{{role}}</role> and your account is <status>{{status}}</status>.

home.title: Welcome to Flama
home.subtitle: You are signed in.
home.counterDescription: A quick demo of the design system components.

import.title: Import wallet
import.subtitle: Paste your 12 or 24 word recovery phrase.
import.invalid: The recovery phrase is not valid

send.title: Send {{symbol}}
send.invalidAddress: The destination address is not valid

welcome.legal: By continuing you agree to the Terms & Privacy Policy.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.subtitle: We'll use this on your profile and when you chat with Dewy, your wallet assistant. You can change it any time.
name.label: Your name

greeting.after: — I'm Dewy, your wallet assistant. What would you like to do first?

backupInfo.title: Set a passcode
backupInfo.subtitle: It locks Drops on this device and approves every payment.

unlock.title: Unlocks Drops
unlock.description: You'll enter it to open the app and approve each payment.

device.title: Stays on this device
device.description: Your passcode never leaves this phone — we can't see it.

noReset.title: Can't be reset
noReset.description: We can't recover it for you. Your recovery phrase is the only backup.

setPasscode.title: Create a passcode
setPasscode.subtitle: Choose six digits you'll remember.
setPasscode.confirmSubtitle: Enter the same six digits again to confirm.
setPasscode.doneSubtitle: Your wallet is now protected on this device.
setPasscode.error: Couldn't set up your passcode. Try again.
setPasscode.note: Your passcode never leaves this device. We can't see it or reset it for you.

secureIntro.title: Back up your new wallet
secureIntro.subtitle: You're about to create a recovery phrase. Three things to know before you do.

masterKey.title: It's your master key
masterKey.description: A 12-word recovery phrase is the only way to restore this wallet — on every XRPL chain.

private.title: Keep it private
private.description: Anyone who sees it can move your funds. Drops will never ask for it.

offline.title: Store it offline
offline.description: Write it down on paper. Don't screenshot it or save it to the cloud.

revealPhrase.title: Your recovery phrase
revealPhrase.subtitle: Write these words down in order and keep them somewhere safe.
revealPhrase.warning: Never screenshot or share these words. Drops support will never ask for them.

import.title: Import your wallet
import.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to restore access. Your keys never leave this device.

phrase.title: Recovery phrase
phrase.help: A list of 12 or 24 ordinary words. The standard backup for most wallets — works on every network.

seed.title: Family seed
seed.help: A single string beginning with s or sEd. The classic XRPL secret — XRP Ledger only.

secret.title: Secret numbers
secret.help: Eight rows of six digits, as used by Xaman. XRP Ledger only.

importPhrase.title: Enter your recovery phrase
importPhrase.subtitle: Type or paste your words in order. Pasting fills every field at once.
importPhrase.errorInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid phrase. Check the highlighted words and their order.
importPhrase.errorImport: That phrase couldn't be imported. Check the words and their order, then try again.
importPhrase.securityNote: Stored encrypted on this device. Your phrase never leaves it.

importSeed.title: Enter your family seed
importSeed.subtitle: Your secret seed begins with s or sEd. It restores your XRP Ledger account only.
importSeed.errorInvalid: This isn't a valid family seed. It should start with s or sEd and contain only base58 characters.
importSeed.errorImport: That seed couldn't be imported. Double-check it and try again.
importSeed.securityNote: Stored encrypted on this device. Your seed never leaves it.

importSecretNumbers.title: Enter your secret numbers
importSecretNumbers.subtitle: Eight rows of six digits, as shown in your backup. Each row checks itself as you type.
importSecretNumbers.errorInvalid: One or more rows don't add up. A red row means a digit is off — re-check it against your backup.
importSecretNumbers.errorImport: Those numbers couldn't be imported. Re-check them against your backup and try again.
importSecretNumbers.securityNote: Each row carries its own checksum, so typos are caught instantly. Nothing leaves this device.

success.title: You're all set
success.subtitlePhrase: Your recovery phrase unlocks the same identity on every XRPL chain.
success.subtitleXrpl: Your XRP Ledger account is ready to go.
success.footnotePhrase: Both addresses are derived from the same recovery phrase — one identity, every chain.
success.footnoteXrpl: The XRPL EVM sidechain isn't available for this import method. Import a recovery phrase to add it.

biometrics.title: Unlock with {{method}}
biometrics.subtitle: Use {{method}} to open Drops and approve payments. It's faster than a passcode — and never leaves your device.

scanning.face: Look at your phone to set up Face ID…
scanning.touch: Touch the sensor to set up your fingerprint…

biometrics.doneSubtitle: You're all set. You can manage this any time in Settings.

benefits.instant: Unlock Drops instantly — no passcode to type
benefits.enclave: {{method}} data stays in your device's secure enclave

notifications.title: Stay on top of your money
notifications.subtitle: Get a heads-up the moment money moves, so you never have to keep checking.

alerts.title: Instant payment alerts
alerts.description: Know the moment XRP or stablecoins land — or leave — your wallet.

security.title: Security you can trust
security.description: We'll flag new sign-ins and anything that needs a second look.

noise.title: Only what matters
noise.description: No noise. Mute any alert type later in settings.

backupQuiz.title: Confirm your backup
backupQuiz.subtitle: Tap the right word for each position to prove you've saved your phrase.
backupQuiz.errorWrongWord: That's not the right word for that position. Check your written backup and try again.
backupQuiz.errorImport: Something went wrong creating your wallet. Please try again.
backupQuiz.reassurance: Almost there. Confirming proves your phrase is safely written down.

unlock.lockedOut: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.
unlock.wipeMessage: This deletes the wallet from this device. You can only restore it with your recovery phrase, family seed or secret numbers.

receive.title: Receive
receive.warning: Only send assets on the <network>{{network}}</network>. Sending from another network may lose your funds.
receive.empty: No receiving account is available yet.

send.settled: To {{name}} · settled on the XRP Ledger
send.invalidAddress: That recipient address isn't valid on this network.
send.empty: No account is available to send from yet.

droppoints.title: DropPoints
droppoints.subtitle: A rewards programme that gives back every time you move money on Drops. We're putting the finishing touches on it.

earn.title: Earn on every move
earn.description: Collect points when you send, receive or swap.

rebates.title: Fee rebates
rebates.description: Redeem points to cut your network fees.

perks.title: Member perks
perks.description: Unlock boosts, early features and surprises.

payments.title: Payments
payments.emptyDescription: Money you send and receive will show up here.

addRecipient.title: Add recipient
addRecipient.securityNote: Double-check the address. XRPL transactions can't be reversed once sent.

errors.invalidName: Enter a name with at least 2 characters.
errors.duplicate: A contact with this address already exists.
errors.generic: Couldn't save the recipient. Try again.

addRecipient.networkSubtitle: Where this recipient's address lives. It decides the address format.

scanRecipient.title: Scan to pay
scanRecipient.subtitle: Point your camera at a recipient's payment QR code.
scanRecipient.invalid: That QR code doesn't contain a payment address.
scanRecipient.permissionBody: Allow camera access to scan a recipient's payment QR code.
